name: blessed-components
description: Composable, typed terminal UI components for Blessed.
author: pilmee <pilmee@gmail.com> (https://github.com/ElJijuna)

scripts.docs:check: typedoc --options typedoc.json --emit none && npm run docs:index:check
scripts.examples:smoke: npm run example:gallery -- --smoke && npm run example:dashboard -- --smoke && npm run example:process-monitor -- --smoke && npm run example:system-inspector -- --smoke
scripts.test:package: npm run package:check && node tests/package-architecture.mjs && node tests/package-exports.mjs && node tests/package-contents.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run docs:check && npm run package:check && npm run build && npm run test:package && npm run examples:smoke
